commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a shared ClawHub owner-match guard to the skill install/update lifecycle and a regression test for owner-qualified forced installs over a differently tracked skill.

PR surface: Source +27, Tests +32. Total +59 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main parses `@owner/slug` to the bare local target, skips the existing-target block under `--force`, and later rewrites origin/lock tracking with the requested owner while update mode can replace the existing directory.
